g.title: emitter
g.text: walshadow emitter — one ordered pipeline, ClickHouse or metrics only

g.title: cluster_src
g.text: reorder coordinator — single-threaded commit order (emit/pipeline/reorder.rs, inner sink of QueueingRecordSink)

g.title: cluster_ddl
g.text: ordered control barriers — DDL / config / TOAST lifecycle

g.title: cluster_ch
g.text: ClickHouse — main insert pool + DDL + TOAST store connections

g.title: reorder
g.text: walk rows and changes in WAL order
empty commits and aborts still advance progress
schema and truncate changes wait for earlier rows

g.title: decode
g.text: detoast: ChunkMap, then store as-of fetch

g.title: ins
g.text: inserter ×N — any idle takes any batch

g.title: apply
g.text: owner TRUNCATE → dest + toast mirror wipe

g.title: legend
g.text: ack collector / null tail / manifest side-channel
UInt32 — source xid; recovers xact boundary
Bool — 1 on delete; ReplacingMergeTree is_deleted arg unless soft_delete
commits may finish out of order; progress advances only after every earlier commit is durable. Failed batch stops process so restart can replay it.
